description_zh: Shiseido（资生堂）是日本历史最悠久的化妆品公司，其历史可追溯至1872年，由福原有信在日本东京银座创立了日本第一家西式药房。品牌名称源自中国古籍《易经》中的"至哉坤元，万物资生"，体现了对生命与自然之美的崇敬。资生堂最初以药品和牙膏等产品起步，1897年推出了具有里程碑意义的Eudermine红色蜜露化妆水，标志着品牌正式进入护肤品领域。作为亚洲美妆行业的先驱，资生堂创造性地将东方哲学与西方科学相结合，在美白、抗衰老和防晒技术方面拥有世界领先的研发实力。集团旗下拥有SHISEIDO、Clé de Peau Beauté、NARS、IPSA、ANESSA、ELIXIR等多个全球知名品牌，产品涵盖护肤、彩妆、香水及专业美发领域。资生堂业务遍布全球120多个国家和地区，以其卓越的研发能力、精致的日式美学和服务体验，成为亚洲第一、全球领先的高端美妆集团之一。

languages.en: Shiseido is Japan's oldest cosmetics company, founded in 1872 by Arinobu Fukuhara in Tokyo's Ginza district as Japan's first Western-style pharmacy. The name, derived from a Chinese classic text, reflects reverence for life and nature. Shiseido launched the iconic Eudermine lotion in 1897, marking its entry into skincare. Pioneering the fusion of Eastern philosophy with Western science, Shiseido excels in whitening, anti-aging, and sun protection technologies. Its portfolio includes prestigious brands such as SHISEIDO, Clé de Peau Beauté, NARS, IPSA, ANESSA, and ELIXIR. Operating in over 120 countries, Shiseido is renowned for its meticulous Japanese aesthetics, world-class R&D, and innovative skincare and makeup products, making it one of Asia's most influential luxury beauty conglomerates.
